name: WDigest Credential Caching (SYSTEM hive)
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: WDigest authentication provider config in the SYSTEM hive (machine-level) — UseLogonCredential controls whether cleartext passwords cache in LSASS.
forensic_value: See malware_indicators 'WDigest Credential Caching Configuration' for full forensic context. This SYSTEM hive location is the machine-wide setting; NTUSER.DAT can also hold per-user override. UseLogonCredential=1 is a high-confidence credential dumping preparation IOC.
